originalTitle: France urges citizens to leave Mali after rebel attacks
title: France urges citizens to leave Mali after rebel attacks
content: The UK has issued similar advice, telling citizens who stay, that they do so at their own risk.

originalTitle: What next for Mali's military leaders after shock of rebel offensive?
title: What next for Mali's military leaders after shock of rebel offensive?
content: The military came to power to bolster security but the weekend's attacks have brought that into question.

originalTitle: Russian paramilitary carried out air strikes in Mali as rebels advanced, footage shows
title: Russian paramilitary carried out air strikes in Mali as rebels advanced, footage shows
content: Last weekend's attacks came as the Africa Corps withdrew from a key base in northern Mali.

originalTitle: How US and Iran are playing a crypto cat-and-mouse game over sanctions
title: How US and Iran are playing a crypto cat-and-mouse game over sanctions
content: Iranian authorities and people are increasingly using cryptocurrencies to evade sanctions. The US is playing catch-up.

originalTitle: Iranian officials absent from pre-World Cup football events in Canada
title: Iranian officials absent from pre-World Cup football events in Canada
content: It is unclear whether football officials from Iran were issued Canadian visas to attend AFC and FIFA congresses.

originalTitle: The UAE’s OPEC exit is not about oil; it is the end of Gulf solidarity
title: The UAE’s OPEC exit is not about oil; it is the end of Gulf solidarity
content: The move reflects a widening confrontation with Saudi Arabia and a fundamental realignment of alliances.

originalTitle: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
content: In the two months since the deadly strike, the US defence department has said only that the incident is under investigation.

originalTitle: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
content: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.

originalTitle: Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
title: Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
content: The new case stems from a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director that the justice department says calls for violence against Trump.

originalTitle: A record-breaking semi-final - the antidote to modern football?
title: A record-breaking semi-final - the antidote to modern football?
content: A scintillating semi-final first leg between Paris St-Germain and Bayern Munich left many to wonder if this was the antidote to modern football.

originalTitle: Chelsea captain Bright retires - what now for ex-England defender?
title: Chelsea captain Bright retires - what now for ex-England defender?
content: Chelsea captain Millie Bright announces she has retired from football with immediate effect because of injury.

originalTitle: The Europa League winner turned director, actor, DJ and photographer
title: The Europa League winner turned director, actor, DJ and photographer
content: Alfie Whiteman picked up a Europa League winner's medal last year, now at 27 he has retired from football and is opening his first photography exhibition.
